channel.title: Git on Greg Beifuss
channel.description: Recent content in Git on Greg Beifuss

item.title: Removing GIT History
item.description: How to remove files completely from the history of a git repository

item.title: Amending a Git Commit Statement
item.description: How to quickly change the git commit message before a push has occurred

item.title: Pushing to GitHub via. Git
item.description: Resolving a ‘Permission Denied (publickey)’ error in git, when pushing to github

item.title: Pushing Hugo Content to GitHub
item.description: Have Hugo generate your site content and use git to push up to github.io
